description: Ground-truth evaluation dataset for the Riverty RAG contract review system. Based on the 4 real contracts in uploads/synthetic_legal_db/persistent_contracts/.

clauses.data_protection: Full GDPR (EU 2016/679) — encryption, access control, data subject rights: access, rectification, erasure, restriction, portability
clauses.termination: Either party, 15 days written notice, no cause required
clauses.liability: Capped at total fees paid in preceding 12 months, no indirect/incidental/consequential

clauses.data_protection: DATA USAGE only — no explicit GDPR obligations, no mention of EU 2016/679
clauses.termination: WEAK — only under exceptional circumstances at Service Provider discretion. No guaranteed termination rights for Client.
clauses.liability: Capped at total fees paid in preceding 12 months, no indirect/incidental/consequential

clauses.data_protection: Full GDPR (EU 2016/679) — encryption, access control, data subject rights
clauses.termination: Either party, 15 days written notice, no cause required
clauses.liability: UNLIMITED — Service Provider assumes full and unlimited liability including direct, indirect, incidental, consequential

clauses.data_protection: Full GDPR (EU 2016/679) — encryption, access control, data subject rights
clauses.termination: WEAK — only under exceptional circumstances at Service Provider discretion. No guaranteed termination rights for Client.
clauses.liability: Capped at total fees paid in preceding 12 months, no indirect/incidental/consequential

questions.question: Which contract is missing a GDPR compliance clause?
questions.description: Tests find_missing: RAG must identify the one contract that lacks GDPR

questions.question: Which contract has unlimited liability?
questions.description: Tests clause detection: identify the contract with an unusual unlimited liability clause

questions.question: Which contracts have a weak termination clause where the client has no guaranteed termination rights?
questions.description: Tests find_missing/compare: must identify two contracts with weak termination

questions.question: How many days written notice is required to terminate the contract_gdpr_strict agreement?
questions.description: Tests specific numeric fact extraction from a termination clause

questions.question: What data subject rights are mentioned in the GDPR compliance clause?
questions.description: Tests detailed clause content extraction from the GDPR section

questions.question: What is the governing law for these contracts?
questions.description: Tests retrieval of governing law clause — same answer across all 4 contracts

questions.question: What is the liability cap in contracts that limit liability?
questions.description: Tests numeric liability cap extraction — 12 months of fees

questions.question: Does contract_missing_gdpr include data protection obligations under EU regulations?
questions.description: Tests negative clause detection — the answer should confirm GDPR is absent

questions.question: Which contracts allow either party to terminate with written notice?
questions.description: Tests find_clause: identify contracts with balanced termination rights for both parties

questions.question: In the contract with unlimited liability, what types of damages is the Service Provider liable for?
questions.description: Tests detailed clause extraction from the unlimited liability contract
